findings.evidence: `rg -n "fixingSubgroup_le_stabilizer|stabilizer" code/TauCeti/Geometry/Diffeomorphism/FixingSubgroup.lean` has no hits, while Mathlib provides the generic theorem at `mathlib/Mathlib/GroupTheory/GroupAction/SubMulAction/OfFixingSubgroup.lean:524`.
findings.fix: Add a specialized theorem such as `fixingSubgroup_le_stabilizer (s : Set M) : fixingSubgroup (I := I) (n := n) s ≤ MulAction.stabilizer (M ≃ₘ^n⟮I, I⟯ M) s`, proved by `MulAction.fixingSubgroup_le_stabilizer`.
findings.issue: `Diffeomorph.fixingSubgroup` has no TauCeti-level lemma exposing that pointwise fixing implies setwise stabilization of `s`, so users must reach through the generic Mathlib theorem instead of the specialized API.

summary: The pointwise-fixer surface is mostly characterized, but it omits the specialized setwise-stabilizer interaction that the relative subgroup API needs.
